flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Anna Maria College are 26% below 6-year earnings ($63.1k → $46.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Anna Maria College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 906).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Anna Maria College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.2k → $44.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Anna Maria College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.2k → $44.6k).
